description: Returns the action assigned to a control of the currently active user dialog. Can be used for buttons and active texts. Read [[Arma: GUI Configuration]] for more information about user dialogs and controls.
examples:
<sqf>
buttonSetAction [100, { player exec "reply.sqs" }];
_action = buttonAction 100; // Returns { player exec "reply.sqs" };
</sqf>
name: buttonAction
